shots.keyframe_moment: 全景小公寓，墙皮剥落，窗帘廉价，桌上绿萝
shots.reasoning_brief: Establishing shot of empty apartment; no characters or dialogue; visual description only.

character_state_overlays.body_state: hand placed on abdomen indicating early pregnancy

shots.keyframe_moment: 沈念歌把手放在小腹上，眼神坚硬

narration_lines.text: 沈念歌（画外音，声音平静得可怕）："我不知道你是谁的。但你是我的。"

shots.reasoning_brief: Voiceover narration; visible character pregnant based on context; no dialogue annotation as it's narration.

character_state_overlays.evidence_quote: 沈念歌的肚子已经很大了，她一个人撑着腰走出门
character_state_overlays.body_state: large belly, supporting waist while walking
character_state_overlays.visible_constraints: post-birth exhaustion implied by solo exit

shots.keyframe_moment: 中景，沈念歌撑腰走出妇幼保健院门口，拎编织袋
shots.location_evidence: source_excerpt line 53: △ （中景）妇幼保健院门口。

narration_lines.text: 没有家属签字，没有陪产。产房里只有她一个人。

shots.reasoning_brief: Visual shot with postpartum state from description; narration for context; local location specified.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 予予……妈妈给你取的名字，知予。知道的知，给予的予。妈妈知道的一切，都想给你。

character_state_overlays.evidence_quote: 她低头看着怀里的婴儿——皱巴巴的小脸，闭着眼睛，小拳头攥得紧紧的。
character_state_overlays.body_state: wrinkled face, eyes closed, fists clenched

shots.keyframe_moment: 近景，沈念歌低头看着怀里婴儿，轻声说话
shots.location_evidence: nearby_context line 53: △ （中景）妇幼保健院门口。
shots.reasoning_brief: Onscreen dialogue to infant; characters visible with states from immediate context; no prop handoff.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: EXTRA_NURSE
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 沈小姐！你产后还没恢复，不能出院——而且孩子的出生登记——父亲那一栏你空着，需要补充——

character_state_overlays.evidence_quote: 你产后还没恢复，不能出院

shots.keyframe_moment: 中景，护士追出，沈念歌头不回走
shots.location_evidence: source_excerpt line 69 context: （中景）护士追出来。
shots.reasoning_brief: Dialogue exchange; nurse as extra; postpartum state evident; local location from context.

shots.keyframe_moment: 沈念歌停下脚步，对护士平静回应
shots.reasoning_brief: Continuation dialogue; state shows determination post-birth; no inheritance from prior as adjacent.

character_state_overlays.evidence_quote: 深夜，一间出租屋。沈念歌一手抱着哭闹的予予，一手在电脑上打字做兼职翻译。
character_state_overlays.body_state: fatigued from late-night work while holding child

shots.keyframe_moment: 画面一：深夜出租屋，沈念歌抱哭闹予予打字；避免拼贴画面二
shots.reasoning_brief: Montage start; keyframe on first picture to avoid multi-time collage; states from exhaustion evidence; local as default.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 祝你生日快乐……祝你生日快乐……

shots.keyframe_moment: 画面四：沈念歌唱生日歌，点蜡烛
shots.location_evidence: nearby_context line 97: 一小块蛋糕，一根蜡烛。
shots.reasoning_brief: Singing dialogue in montage; child age overlay; no prop from previous empty.

shots.keyframe_moment: 沈念歌笑拦住予予抓蜡烛
shots.location_evidence: nearby_context line 101: 予予伸手去抓蜡烛上的火苗。
shots.reasoning_brief: Dialogue with action on child; continuation of birthday scene; no visible state change.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 妈咪，那个房子好大！我们以后能住那么大的房子吗？

character_state_overlays.evidence_quote: 予予两岁半。他比同龄孩子高一头，说话也更早。

shots.keyframe_moment: 公交车内，予予指窗外大楼对妈咪说话
shots.location_evidence: nearby_context line 109: 沈念歌带他坐公交车，予予指着窗外的大楼。
shots.reasoning_brief: Child dialogue; local bus location; age overlay covers global if conflict.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 我爸爸……在很远的地方。但我觉得他会来找我。

shots.keyframe_moment: 幼儿园面试，予予回答老师问题

music_cues.cue: 钢琴渐起，温柔中带着心酸

shots.reasoning_brief: Dialogue in interview; local location; music from nearby; age state.

shots.keyframe_moment: 中景，予予趴桌画画，沈念歌看手机预约信息
shots.reasoning_brief: Visual shot with prop smartphone; no dialogue; time shift to present.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 滨海市？就是那个有大高楼的城市？

shots.reasoning_brief: Child response dialogue; no states; prop phone from previous but no handoff action.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 妈咪，滨海市……是不是我爸爸在的地方？

shots.keyframe_moment: 沈念歌闭眼，画外音内心独白

narration_lines.text: 沈念歌（画外音）："四年了。我以为这辈子都不会再回到那个城市。可是予予需要最好的医生。而最好的医生……在滨海市。"

shots.reasoning_brief: Voiceover narration; no listener as internal.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 妈咪你看！这是我们一家三口！中间这个黑色的是爸爸，因为我还没见过他！等见到了我就涂成肉色！

shots.keyframe_moment: 予予跑来举画给妈咪看

music_cues.cue: 弦乐轻起，从心酸转为温柔，但暗流涌动

shots.reasoning_brief: Child shows drawing; music cue from nearby.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 好。等找到了，你涂成最漂亮的颜色。

shots.keyframe_moment: 沈念歌蹲下抱住予予回应
shots.reasoning_brief: Mother's emotional response with hug; action on child.
